chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يَشْتَرِي الرَّقِيقَ فَيَظْهَرُ بِهِ عَيْبٌ وَ مَا يُرَدُّ مِنْهُ وَ مَا لَا يُرَدُّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 94 – The one who buys the slave so a defact is evident with him, and what is returnable from it, and what is not returnable

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/244)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/244)
text: الرَّجُلِ يَشْتَرِي الْجَارِيَةَ الْحُبْلَى فَيَنْكِحُهَا وَ هُوَ لَا يَعْلَمُ قَالَ يَرُدُّهَا وَ يَكْسُوهَا.

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who buys the pregnant slave girl, so he copulates with her but he did not know’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should return her and clothe her’.
en.sarwar: 8. Humayd has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from al-from more than one person from Aban from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah who has said the following: “About the case of a man who buys a slave-girl, then does sexual intercourse, then finds her to be pregnant, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘He must return her with something.’”
